grigson | Chart Format | CLI Reference | Renderer | Testing | Demo

Normalisation Demo

This page demonstrates the automatic normalisation of a chord chart. The input below is "badly" spelled (e.g. using A# in F major) and has inconsistent spacing. The output is generated by grigson in your browser.

Input



title: Demo Song
key: F




| F | A# | F | C7 |
|F|Bb|C|F|



Output


Loading...



    

    

      
grigson — a .chart file parser and normaliser
